title: Sweden blocks reimbursement of obesity drug over pricing, prescription concerns [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: The risk of the weight loss drug being prescribed outside its pharmaceutical indication was considered too high, while for children, the price was deemed inflated
summary_public: The risk of the weight loss drug being prescribed outside its pharmaceutical indication was considered too high, while for children, the price was deemed inflated
